You had just transferred schools the day you turned 18 because your parents said you had to go. 'Parents know best' Yeah Yeah whatever... Now you're finally showing up to the school and 'meeting' one of your ex-best friend's sexy rival.
___

CASPIAN'S RIVAL // SETH'S OLDER BROTHER <3
CN: Finally I finished the series my hands hurt from typing, I've been doing this to get my ass off writers block but I'm tired asf rn so if I spelled smth wrong idk what to tell you, he is very similar to bbg Caspian bc I gave up half way through coming up with a scenario, and a BIGGG TYTY to my loyal baby Aryhe I will continue to feed all my children in the basement😌
